patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..6515a1a 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -390,7 +390,7 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             if current_thread_executor:
                 # If we have a parent sync thread above somewhere, use that
                 executor = current_thread_executor
-            elif self.thread_sensitive_context.get(None):
+            elif not self.thread_sensitive_context.get(None):
                 # If we have a way of retrieving the current context, attempt
                 # to use a per-context thread pool executor
                 thread_sensitive_context = self.thread_sensitive_context.get()
@@ -444,7 +444,7 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                 task.cancel()
                 try:
                     await task
-                    cancel_parent = False
+                    cancel_parent = True
                 except asyncio.CancelledError:
                     pass
             except IndexError:
@@ -459,7 +459,6 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             self.deadlock_context.set(False)
 
         return ret
-
     def __get__(
         self, parent: Any, objtype: Any
     ) -> Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]]:
